en: Okay, I'm just gonna double-check your form here. Ron, you redacted all the information.
I answered some of them. For date of birth, you wrote springtime.
Which is true. Everything you write down is confidential.
We need you to give real answers. Fine.
ko: 우리는 당신이 진짜 답변을 해주길 원해요. 좋아요.

en: How many drinks of alcohol do you consume a week? One. That's it?
ko: 일주일에 얼마나 많은 술을 마시나요? 하나요.

en: One drink? One shelf. Do you exercise?
Do you have any history of mental illness in your family?
ko: 가족 중에 정신 질환 이력이 있나요?

en: I have an uncle who does yoga. Allergies?
Cowardice and weak-willed men. And hazelnuts.
ko: 비겁함과 의지가 약한 남자들. 그리고 헤이즐넛.

en: Okay, I'm gonna go get your doctor. He's a rude, brash jerk.
Tommy T, you just missed the craziest of crazies.
ko: 토미 T, 당신은 가장 미친 상황을 놓쳤어요.

en: Clubs, girls, dancing, naked, mom, argument, police,
ko: 클럽, 여자들, 춤, 나체, 엄마, 논쟁, 경찰,

en: fleeing the scene, hiding in a dumpster, coming here, crashing on your couch for a week

ko: 왜냐하면 사실상 나는 노숙자거든요. 안녕, 콧수염.
